_comment: BLIND stimulus for the novelty-reserve pressure. Opaque item ids; no labels, no predictions, no condition names. The measurement (scripts/novelty-reserve.mjs) emits per-line channels for every item over PRIOR CONTEXT ONLY and never reads the key. The held key (key.json) is a separate file the run never sees. Every line is the same shape — 'Name entered.' / a single note — so line length, token count and verb are matched across items; only the IDENTITY/NOVELTY timing differs. Cast names and the phenomenon ('figures entering a scene') are drawn from random Wikipedia articles (seeds of record in key.json), not from imagination.
